video_example.command: python spriteforge.py video --input input/wan_walk.mp4 --output output/wan_walk_sprite --fps 12 --cell-size 512x512 --key-color auto --key-tolerance 45 --anchor bottom-center --pad 24 --solidify 2 --drop-loop-duplicate --preview-gif --report

pack_example.command: python spriteforge.py pack --input output/ortho_frames --output output/ortho_sprite --fps 12 --cell-size 512x512 --anchor bottom-center --solidify 2 --preview-gif --report
